Kind of Ambition

Hot Desks
Flexible open seating in our bright communal floor. Walk in, open your laptop, get to work.

◉
Dedicated Desks
Your own assigned desk with lockable storage. Come back every day to a space that's yours.

Private Suites
Enclosed offices for teams of 2–10 with dedicated fiber, branding options, and total privacy.
From $850 / month

⬡
Conference Rooms
Four rooms seating 4–14, with 4K displays, video conferencing, and whiteboards.
From $35 / hour
→
◎
Coworking Space
Shared tables and open floors for freelancers, remote workers, and independent professionals. Community energy, full amenities, no dedicated seat required.
From $229 / month
→
◇
Day Rental
Reserve a guaranteed desk for a single day with full amenity access — no membership needed. Book your spot, arrive ready, leave when you’re done.
From $45 / day
→
